content.text: Hi! How can I help today? I can draft emails, schedule meetings, create docs/sheets, manage tasks, and more.

content: can u wake me up after 15 mins

content.text:
I can’t ring an alarm on your device, but I can set a reminder.

Want me to:
- create a Google Tasks reminder for 4:55 PM IST today (15 minutes from now), or
- add a Calendar event at 4:55 PM IST?

Which do you prefer? If you say “both,” I’ll set both so you don’t miss it.
